name: 3d-studio
description: Turn natural language and reference images into print-ready 3D files (STL/3MF/GLB) through an interactive design session. A local-first, manifold-by-construction CAD engine the agent authors — with an artistic style system, a packaged reference library of subject proportions, a JSON design-plan source-of-truth, a vision-grounded fidelity loop, printer profiles, git-tracked history, and a live React + three.js preview UI. Print-readiness is validated against the 2026 AI 3D Print-Readiness Benchmark.
